Bash(cd "D:\\Python Project\\stock_screener" && C:\\Users\\juheo\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python310\\python.exe -c "
import math, pandas as pd

def _ordinal\(n\):
    n = int\(n\)
    if 11 <= \(n % 100\) <= 13:
        return f'{n}th'
    return f'{n}{[\\"th\\",\\"st\\",\\"nd\\",\\"rd\\",\\"th\\"][min\(n % 10, 4\)]}'

for x in [1,2,3,4,11,12,13,21,22,89,100]:
    print\(f'{x} -> {_ordinal\(x\)}'\)

vol = pd.Series\([100,200,150,300,250,180,400,120,90,350], dtype=float\)
n = 5
vol_ma  = vol.rolling\(n, min_periods=1\).mean\(\)
vol_std = vol.rolling\(n, min_periods=2\).std\(\)
vol_pct = vol.rank\(pct=True\) * 100
vol_z   = \(vol - vol_ma\) / vol_std
print\('vol_pct:', vol_pct.values.round\(1\)\)
print\('vol_z:',   vol_z.values.round\(2\)\)
")

Bash(cd "D:/Python Project/stock_screener" && "/c/Users/juheo/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python310/python.exe" -c "
import math, pandas as pd

def _ordinal\(n\):
    n = int\(n\)
    if 11 <= \(n % 100\) <= 13:
        return f'{n}th'
    return f'{n}{[chr\(116\)+chr\(104\), chr\(115\)+chr\(116\), chr\(110\)+chr\(100\), chr\(114\)+chr\(100\), chr\(116\)+chr\(104\)][min\(n % 10, 4\)]}'

for x in [1,2,3,4,11,12,13,21,22,89,100]:
    print\(x, '->', _ordinal\(x\)\)

vol = pd.Series\([100,200,150,300,250,180,400,120,90,350], dtype=float\)
n = 5
vol_ma  = vol.rolling\(n, min_periods=1\).mean\(\)
vol_std = vol.rolling\(n, min_periods=2\).std\(\)
vol_pct = vol.rank\(pct=True\) * 100
vol_z   = \(vol - vol_ma\) / vol_std
print\('vol_pct:', list\(vol_pct.values.round\(1\)\)\)
print\('vol_z:',   list\(vol_z.values.round\(2\)\)\)
")

import ast
with open\('D:/Python Project/stock_screener/frontend/pages/retirement.py', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    src = f.read\(\)
ast.parse\(src\)
funcs = [n.name for n in ast.walk\(ast.parse\(src\)\) if isinstance\(n, ast.FunctionDef\)]
print\('Functions:', funcs\)
print\(f'Total lines: {src.count\(chr\(10\)\)}'\)
print\('Syntax OK'\)
")

import ast, sys
files = [
    'frontend/pages/etf.py',
    'src/api/routers/etf.py',
    'src/api/schemas.py',
    'src/ingestion/etf.py',
    'src/metrics.py',
    'frontend/api_client.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")
